{{nihongo|'''Kineno Shrine'''|木根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kineno Shrine'''|木根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kineno Shrine'''|木根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kineno Shrine'''|木根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kineno Shrine'''|木根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iga Province]].
